name: Korean Bean Thread Sesame Noodles with Vegeta
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried mushrooms in warm water for 20 minutes until soft. Squeeze out the excess liquid, remove and discard the stalks, then cut the caps into shreds.
2. Soak the cloud ears in warm water for about 20 minutes or until soft. Rinse them well in cold water and drain thoroughly in a colander.
3. Soak the noodles in a large bowl of very hot water for 15 minutes. When softened, drain well. Cut the noodles into 3-inch lengths using scissors or a knife.
4. Peel and finely shred the carrot, green pepper, and onion.
5. Heat a wok or large frying pan with oil until moderately hot. Add the mushrooms, cloud ears, carrot, onion, and green pepper, and stir-fry for 5 minutes or until the carrots are cooked.
6. Combine the sauce ingredients in a bowl. Add them to the vegetables and give everything a good stir. Then add the noodles and stir-fry for 2 minutes until well heated through.
7. Serve immediately at room temperature.
